title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Unlock Park Ranger Outfits
content: The wilderness around Los Santos needs guardians to protect it. Join their ranks: players who own the Declasse Park Ranger (Emergency) and log in between April 2 and April 8 will receive the Winter Park Ranger Outfit. Park Ranger owners who return the following week (April 9 – 15) will get the Summer Park Ranger with Tie Outfit. Both gifts will be awarded within 72 hours.
